rationale: The citing paper references Stephen and Galak (2012) in the modeling-challenges section as an example of prior marketing research using a multivariate Gaussian copula for count data. This is used to illustrate the broader methodological landscape, alongside other grouped citations, before introducing the paper's own vine pair-copula approach. The citing paper does not build its hypotheses, empirical setting, or core model specification directly on Stephen and Galak's study, nor does it engage its substantive findings in interpretation.
